themes.name: Aurora
themes.author: MyMediaVault
themes.description: Soft gradient background, slightly larger font, rounded search, and a detail page with the cover on top.

themes.name: Crimson
themes.author: MyMediaVault
themes.description: A single crimson accent everywhere, with custom Movies and Music tab colours.

themes.name: Slider
themes.author: cubman3134
themes.description: A spinning EmulationStation/RetroBat-style carousel. Media types and catalogues become an infinite, box-art slider that you spin through with the arrow keys.

themes.name: Triple (Classic XMB)
themes.author: cubman3134
themes.description: The original colour-theme XMB layout (native cross). Superseded by the declarative "Triple" theme below.

themes2.name: Default
themes2.author: My Media Vault
themes2.description: The default themed home: a centred system carousel with a poster, title, rating and a help bar.

themes2.name: Grid
themes2.author: My Media Vault
themes2.description: A dense poster grid of your catalogs with a live preview + detail panel.

themes2.name: Lumen
themes2.author: My Media Vault
themes2.description: A light theme: a five-wide poster grid on a near-white background.

themes2.name: Midnight
themes2.author: My Media Vault
themes2.description: A dark theme with a centred carousel, a full detail view, and a subtle starfield.

themes2.name: Triple
themes2.author: cubman3134
themes2.description: A PlayStation-style XrossMediaBar: four media categories (Video / Games / Audio / Reading) crossed with the selected category's item column, over an animated wave, with navigation sounds. Drawn icons, fully arrow-key / controller / mouse navigable.
